title: Crazy Kitty's FNaF Management Wanted Pack
description: A modpack focused primarily on FNaF: Management Wanted, created by OVDR.
body:
**_NOTICE: I DO NOT OWN / HAVE NOT OWNED / OR AM NOT A CURRENT DEVELOPER OF ANY OF THE FEATURED MODS. I AM NOT AFFILIATED WITH THESE MODS OR THEIR RESPECTIVE CREATORS IN ANY WAY._**

This is the collection of mods that I use in my survival playthrough of the Management Wanted mod. With a full series of my playthrough available on Youtube. The primary focus of this the Management Wanted mod, adding in many entities, blocks, and mechanics themed around FNaF. However, there are other mods, such as Create and Farmer's Delight, that aims to add some more variability when it comes to progressing. There is also a variety of quality-of-life mods, such as Easy Villagers and Sophisticated Backpacks, that help expedite some of the more time-consuming tasks of regular survival, allowing for more time to be spent focusing on the main course of this modpack. A full list of all the mods included can be found listed below!

Mods List (With credits!):
- AppleSkin - squeek502
- Architectury API - shedaniel
- Armor Poser - Mrbysco
- Artifacts - echotonida
- Cloth Config API - shedaniel
- CMDCam - CreativeMD
- Comforts - TheIllusiveC4
- Create - simibubi
- Creative Core - CreativeMD
- Curios API - TheIllusiveC4
- [Easy Villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-villagers) - henkelmax
- Effortless Building - Requioss
- Farmer's Delight - vectorwing
- Fnaf Management Wanted - OVDRStudios
- Freecam - hashalite
- GeckoLib - Gecko
- Jade - Snownee
- Just Enough Items - mezz
- Just Enough Resources - way2muchnoise
- Mouse Tweaks - YaLTeR

Resource Packs :
- Icons - mr_cho0c0late
- Create Style Sophisticated Backpacks - Luna
- Visible Ores - Techy69

If you'd like to see the series where I play with this modpack in survival, you can find the playlist [here](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLnz5KrgwGQaj1qVJY-A4c5Y0hO18ucorM).
